chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3660 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of main case 10.08.2023 Mr. Altaf Hussain Solangi advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- The petitioner claims to have been part and parcel of the process for the appointment of Primary School Teacher. She claims to have appeared in the examination in the year 2012 and now after almost a decade she attempted to exhaust the remedy of this Court without explaining the delay of 10 years. The petition seriously suffers from laches and the petitioner has slept over her right. Petition is dismissed as such. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
